patterns_discovered.name: Atomic Write Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Write to temporary file then rename atomically

patterns_discovered.name: Graceful Degradation
patterns_discovered.description: Missing/corrupted files fallback to default state
patterns_discovered.benefit: System continues functioning without data loss panic

patterns_discovered.name: Domain-Specific State Buckets
patterns_discovered.description: Separate keys for trades, cooldowns, watch_state, timestamps
patterns_discovered.benefit: Logical separation of concerns within single file
patterns_discovered.implementation: Four dictionary keys in state structure

gotchas_discovered.description: Multiple processes writing simultaneously could cause race conditions
gotchas_discovered.example: os.rename() not atomic across all filesystems; no file locking implemented

gotchas_discovered.description: Only validates top-level structure, not nested objects
gotchas_discovered.example: Doesn't validate trade_data dict structure inside active_trades[symbol]

gotchas_discovered.description: Errors logged but not reported to caller
gotchas_discovered.example: _save_state() catches exceptions but doesn't signal failure

gotchas_discovered.description: Module-level logging.basicConfig() could conflict with app logging
gotchas_discovered.example: Line 12-13 sets root logger level unconditionally
Assumes 'cd' files contain numeric timestamp or dict with 't' key

gotchas_discovered.issue: No backup mechanism before atomic rename
gotchas_discovered.description: If rename fails, original state lost but not backed up

approach_outcome.consolidation_achieved: Multiple state concerns unified into single manager
key_accomplishments: Created 414-line StateManager with 4 state domain management
Implemented atomic write pattern for data integrity
Added comprehensive error handling with graceful fallback
Designed schema validation with version tracking
Built legacy migration utilities for backward compatibility
Used exception-safe pattern throughout (try/except in all public methods)
design_decisions: JSON format chosen for simplicity and human readability
Single consolidated file vs. separate files per domain
Instance namespace parameter for multi-instance support

recommendations.suggestion: Add file locking (fcntl on Unix, msvcrt on Windows) to prevent concurrent corruption
recommendations.rationale: Current implementation vulnerable to multi-process race conditions

recommendations.suggestion: Add comprehensive unit tests for edge cases: corrupted JSON, missing keys, concurrent writes
recommendations.rationale: Critical state persistence code needs validation

recommendations.suggestion: Use jsonschema library for deep schema validation instead of manual checks
recommendations.rationale: Current validation misses nested structure issues

recommendations.suggestion: Return success/failure status from save_trade_state() and other write methods
recommendations.rationale: Callers currently unaware if state persistence failed

recommendations.suggestion: Create .bak backup before atomic rename in _save_state()
recommendations.rationale: Provides recovery path if rename operation fails

recommendations.suggestion: Move logging.basicConfig() out or make it optional
recommendations.rationale: Prevents conflicts when used as library component

recommendations.suggestion: Add schema version migration handler for future format upgrades
recommendations.rationale: SCHEMA_VERSION exists but no upgrade path implemented

recommendations.suggestion: Support environment variable override for state file location
